summary.en: For PV modules within the Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU) scope, the mandatory obligation is conformity with the LVD safety objectives and CE conformity-assessment duties. EN IEC 61730-1 (construction requirements) and EN IEC 61730-2 (testing requirements) are voluntary harmonised standards commonly used for PV module safety qualification and to support presumption of conformity. Safety classes (SC I, SC II) and application classes (A, B, C) should be declared when using that framework. Perovskite and tandem modules can use the same framework; no dedicated perovskite sub-standard yet exists within IEC 61730 as of 2026.
summary.zh: 对于属于《低压指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）范围内的光伏组件，强制性义务是符合LVD安全目标及CE合格评定义务。EN IEC 61730-1（结构要求）和EN IEC 61730-2（测试要求）是通常用于光伏组件安全鉴定并支持符合性推定的自愿性协调标准。采用该框架时，应声明安全等级（SC I、SC II）和应用等级（A、B、C）。钙钛矿和叠层组件可使用同一框架；截至2026年，IEC 61730框架下尚无钙钛矿专项子标准。
summary.zht: 對於屬於《低壓指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）範圍內的光伏組件，強制性義務是符合LVD安全目標及CE合格評定義務。EN IEC 61730-1（結構要求）和EN IEC 61730-2（測試要求）是通常用於光伏組件安全鑑定並支持符合性推定的自願性協調標準。採用該框架時，應聲明安全等級（SC I、SC II）和應用等級（A、B、C）。鈣鈦礦和疊層組件可使用同一框架；截至2026年，IEC 61730框架下尚無鈣鈦礦專項子標準。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61730-1:2018+A11:2020 (PV module safety qualification Part 1: requirements for construction)
EN IEC 61730-2:2018+A11:2020 (PV module safety qualification Part 2: requirements for testing)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 37409-2019 (equivalent to IEC 61730-1/-2) for PV module safety qualification. CQC or CGC third-party certification is common for domestic market access. No separate perovskite safety qualification standard exists under GB/T as of 2026. No official guidance from MIIT or NEA specifically addressing perovskite module enforcement scope under GB/T 37409-2019 has been confirmed as of mid-2026; the standard's general scope applies by default.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 37409-2019（等同IEC 61730-1/-2）进行光伏组件安全认证。CQC或CGC第三方认证在国内市场准入中较为普遍。截至2026年，GB/T体系下尚无钙钛矿专项安全认证标准。截至2026年中期，未发现工信部或国家能源局针对GB/T 37409-2019钙钛矿组件执行范围的专项指导意见；该标准的一般范围条款默认适用。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 37409-2019（等同IEC 61730-1/-2）進行光伏組件安全認證。CQC或CGC第三方認證在國內市場準入中較為普遍。截至2026年，GB/T體系下尚無鈣鈦礦專項安全認證標準。截至2026年中期，未發現工信部或國家能源局針對GB/T 37409-2019鈣鈦礦組件執行範圍的專項指導意見；該標準的一般範圍條款默認適用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37409-2019 (photovoltaic module safety qualification, equivalent to IEC 61730)

gap.en: Perovskite and tandem PV modules present novel safety risks not fully covered by IEC 61730: potential lead or other heavy-metal leakage, faster moisture ingress, and encapsulant compatibility issues. CE marking requires conformity with the applicable EU legal requirements; EN IEC 61730 is a voluntary harmonised route that can confer presumption of conformity for covered safety objectives, but equivalent technical solutions may be used. No perovskite-specific safety addendum has been harmonised under the LVD as of mid-2026, and no perovskite-specific harmonised draft standard under CEN/CENELEC has been confirmed as published or in formal ballot as of mid-2026. Exporters should engage a conformity-assessment body or competent test laboratory early.
gap.zh: 钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件存在IEC 61730尚未完全覆盖的新型安全风险：铅或其他重金属潜在泄漏、水分渗入加速及封装材料兼容性问题。CE标志要求符合适用欧盟法律要求；EN IEC 61730是可对其覆盖的安全目标产生符合性推定的自愿性协调标准路径，但也可采用等效技术方案。截至2026年中期，LVD框架下尚无经协调的钙钛矿专项安全附录，CEN/CENELEC亦未发布或进入正式投票程序的钙钛矿专项协调标准草案。出口商应尽早联系合格评定机构或具备能力的测试实验室。
gap.zht: 鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件存在IEC 61730尚未完全覆蓋的新型安全風險：鉛或其他重金屬潛在洩漏、水分滲入加速及封裝材料相容性問題。CE標誌要求符合適用歐盟法律要求；EN IEC 61730是可對其覆蓋的安全目標產生符合性推定的自願性協調標準路徑，但也可採用等效技術方案。截至2026年中期，LVD框架下尚無經協調的鈣鈦礦專項安全附錄，CEN/CENELEC亦未發布或進入正式投票程序的鈣鈦礦專項協調標準草案。出口商應儘早聯繫合格評定機構或具備能力的測試實驗室。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where in scope: compliance with the LVD safety objectives and CE conformity-assessment duties. EN IEC 61730-1/-2 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity; they are not themselves mandatory or the sole route to EU market access.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 37409); mandatory CQC/CGC certification for certain subsidy programmes and grid-connection approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. EU market access for in-scope perovskite/tandem PV modules requires CE conformity with the LVD safety objectives. EN IEC 61730-1/-2 is a voluntary harmonised route to demonstrate conformity and obtain presumption of conformity for covered risks; equivalent technical evidence may be acceptable. No dedicated perovskite safety harmonised standard exists as of 2026. Engage a conformity-assessment body or competent test laboratory for pre-assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。属于范围内的钙钛矿/叠层光伏组件进入欧盟市场，须通过CE合格评定证明符合LVD安全目标。EN IEC 61730-1/-2是用于证明符合性并就其覆盖风险取得符合性推定的自愿性协调标准路径；等效技术证据亦可能被接受。截至2026年，尚无专门的钙钛矿安全协调标准。建议提前联系合格评定机构或具备能力的测试实验室进行预评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。屬於範圍內的鈣鈦礦/疊層光伏組件進入歐盟市場，須通過CE合格評定證明符合LVD安全目標。EN IEC 61730-1/-2是用於證明符合性並就其覆蓋風險取得符合性推定的自願性協調標準路徑；等效技術證據亦可能被接受。截至2026年，尚無專門的鈣鈦礦安全協調標準。建議提前聯繫合格評定機構或具備能力的測試實驗室進行預評估。

requirement_topic.en: PV Module Design Qualification and Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏组件设计鉴定与型式认证
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏組件設計鑒定與型式認證

summary.en: PV module design qualification and type approval can be demonstrated using EN IEC 61215-1 (requirements) and EN IEC 61215-2 (test procedures), but those standards are voluntary conformity tools rather than mandatory EU law. Where CE legislation applies, the legal obligation is conformity with the relevant directive or regulation; EN IEC 61215 evidence is commonly used for technical documentation, customer acceptance, and performance claims. For perovskite and tandem modules, the standard damp-heat (1000 h at 85 C/85% RH), thermal cycling (200 cycles), UV preconditioning, and humidity-freeze tests pose significant challenges due to inherent perovskite instability. IEC TS 63209 (extended stress testing) is additionally relevant as a guide for more demanding reliability evaluation of emerging PV technologies including perovskite.
summary.zh: 光伏组件设计鉴定与型式认证可采用EN IEC 61215-1（要求）和EN IEC 61215-2（测试程序）证明，但这些标准是自愿性符合性工具，而非强制性欧盟法律。若CE法规适用，法律义务是符合相关指令或法规；EN IEC 61215证据通常用于技术文件、客户验收及性能声明。对于钙钛矿及叠层组件，受限于材料固有的不稳定性，标准湿热测试（85摄氏度/85%RH，1000小时）、热循环（200次）、紫外预处理及湿冻测试均面临重大挑战。IEC TS 63209（延伸应力测试）亦作为更严格可靠性评估的参考指南，尤其适用于包括钙钛矿在内的新兴光伏技术。
summary.zht: 光伏組件設計鑒定與型式認證可採用EN IEC 61215-1（要求）和EN IEC 61215-2（測試程序）證明，但這些標準是自願性符合性工具，而非強制性歐盟法律。若CE法規適用，法律義務是符合相關指令或法規；EN IEC 61215證據通常用於技術文件、客戶驗收及性能聲明。對於鈣鈦礦及疊層組件，受限於材料固有的不穩定性，標準濕熱測試（85攝氏度/85%RH，1000小時）、熱循環（200次）、紫外預處理及濕凍測試均面臨重大挑戰。IEC TS 63209（延伸應力測試）亦作為更嚴格可靠性評估的參考指南，尤其適用於包括鈣鈦礦在內的新興光伏技術。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61215-1:2021 (terrestrial PV modules - design qualification and type approval Part 1: test requirements)
EN IEC 61215-2:2021 (terrestrial PV modules - design qualification and type approval Part 2: test procedures)
IEC TS 63209-1:2021 (extended stress testing for PV modules Part 1: system)
IEC TS 63209-2:2022 (extended stress testing for PV modules Part 2: polymeric component materials)

summary.en: China has updated GB/T 9535 to a multi-part series — GB/T 9535.1-2025 (test requirements) and GB/T 9535.2-2025 (test procedures), both published 2025-10-05 and effective 2026-05-01, superseding GB/T 9535-1998. GB/T 9535.101-2025 covers crystalline silicon-specific requirements. This updated series is structurally aligned with IEC 61215-1/-2 (2021 editions) in its multi-part format. A direct perovskite or tandem PV design qualification standard equivalent to EN IEC 61215 has not been established under GB/T as of 2026. Domestic manufacturers targeting EU export commonly test to EN IEC 61215 for technical evidence and customer acceptance; Chinese GB/T certification alone is unlikely to be sufficient for EU CE technical documentation or market acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国已将GB/T 9535更新为多分册系列——GB/T 9535.1-2025（测试要求）及GB/T 9535.2-2025（测试程序），均于2025年10月5日发布，2026年5月1日起实施，取代GB/T 9535-1998。GB/T 9535.101-2025涵盖晶硅专项要求。更新系列在结构上与IEC 61215-1/-2（2021年版）的多分册格式保持一致。截至2026年，GB/T体系下尚未建立针对钙钛矿或叠层光伏组件的设计鉴定等效标准。面向欧盟出口的国内制造商通常依据EN IEC 61215进行测试，以形成技术证据并满足客户验收；仅持有中国GB/T认证通常不足以支撑欧盟CE技术文件或市场接受。
summary.zht: 中國已將GB/T 9535更新為多分冊系列——GB/T 9535.1-2025（測試要求）及GB/T 9535.2-2025（測試程序），均於2025年10月5日發布，2026年5月1日起實施，取代GB/T 9535-1998。GB/T 9535.101-2025涵蓋晶矽專項要求。更新系列在結構上與IEC 61215-1/-2（2021年版）的多分冊格式保持一致。截至2026年，GB/T體系下尚未建立針對鈣鈦礦或疊層光伏組件的設計鑒定等效標準。面向歐盟出口的國內製造商通常依據EN IEC 61215進行測試，以形成技術證據並滿足客戶驗收；僅持有中國GB/T認證通常不足以支撐歐盟CE技術文件或市場接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9535.1-2025 / GB/T 9535.2-2025 / GB/T 9535.101-2025 (terrestrial PV modules — design qualification and type approval, multi-part series, published 2025-10-05, effective 2026-05-01, supersedes GB/T 9535-1998; structurally aligned with IEC 61215-1/-2:2021)

gap.en: Perovskite and tandem PV modules face a significant type-approval evidence gap: the standard IEC 61215 test sequences (damp-heat 1000 h, 200 thermal cycles, UV) were designed for mature crystalline silicon technology. Perovskite degradation under these conditions can be rapid, making pass/fail outcomes uncertain. IEC TS 63209 provides extended stress sequences but is a technical specification, not a harmonised standard for CE purposes and not a mandatory legal requirement. No dedicated perovskite or tandem design qualification standard is harmonised under the EU CPR or LVD as of mid-2026; no specific perovskite harmonised draft has been published by CEN/CENELEC as of this date. China's updated GB/T 9535 series (effective 2026-05-01) mirrors the IEC 61215-1/-2:2021 structure but still does not cover perovskite-specific degradation modes, leaving an export evidence burden for EU-facing technical files, customers, lenders, and insurers. No IEC TC82 perovskite working group publication timeline has been confirmed as of mid-2026.
gap.zh: 钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件面临显著的型式认证证据缺口：IEC 61215标准测试序列（湿热1000小时、200次热循环、紫外）专为成熟晶硅技术设计，钙钛矿在这些条件下可能迅速降解，导致通过率不确定。IEC TS 63209提供了延伸应力序列，但仅为技术规范，并非CE意义上的协调标准，也非强制性法律要求。截至2026年中期，欧盟CPR或LVD框架下尚无针对钙钛矿或叠层组件的设计鉴定专项协调标准，CEN/CENELEC也尚未发布任何钙钛矿专项协调标准草案。中国更新版GB/T 9535系列（2026年5月1日起实施）在结构上与IEC 61215-1/-2:2021保持一致，但仍未涵盖钙钛矿特有降解模式，使出口商在面向欧盟的技术文件、客户、贷款方和保险方证据方面承担额外负担。截至2026年中期，IEC TC82钙钛矿工作组尚无已确认的发布时间表。
gap.zht: 鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件面臨顯著的型式認證證據缺口：IEC 61215標準測試序列（濕熱1000小時、200次熱循環、紫外）專為成熟晶矽技術設計，鈣鈦礦在這些條件下可能迅速降解，導致通過率不確定。IEC TS 63209提供了延伸應力序列，但僅為技術規範，並非CE意義上的協調標準，也非強制性法律要求。截至2026年中期，歐盟CPR或LVD框架下尚無針對鈣鈦礦或疊層組件的設計鑒定專項協調標準，CEN/CENELEC亦尚未發布任何鈣鈦礦專項協調標準草案。中國更新版GB/T 9535系列（2026年5月1日起實施）在結構上與IEC 61215-1/-2:2021保持一致，但仍未涵蓋鈣鈦礦特有降解模式，使出口商在面向歐盟的技術文件、客戶、貸款方和保險方證據方面承擔額外負擔。截至2026年中期，IEC TC82鈣鈦礦工作組尚無已確認的發布時間表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: conformity with the applicable EU directive/regulation for the product and application, such as LVD where in scope or CPR for certain building-integrated uses. EN IEC 61215-1/-2 and IEC TS 63209 are voluntary technical standards/specifications used as evidence for type approval, performance, and bankability; they are not themselves mandatory or the sole EU market-access route.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 9535); not yet mandatory specifically for perovskite; mandatory type-testing required for national subsidy and grid-connection programmes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Perovskite and tandem PV modules exported to the EU need evidence supporting conformity with applicable EU legal requirements and performance claims. EN IEC 61215-1/-2 design qualification is a common voluntary route for that evidence; IEC TS 63209 extended stress tests are advisory but may be demanded by customers, financiers, and insurers for bankability. No dedicated harmonised perovskite standard exists as of 2026. Chinese GB/T 9535 certification alone may not satisfy EU technical-file expectations or market acceptance. Exporters should conduct pre-qualification testing and engage competent EU conformity-assessment or test bodies early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。出口欧盟的钙钛矿和叠层光伏组件需要形成证据，以支持其符合适用欧盟法律要求及性能声明。EN IEC 61215-1/-2设计鉴定是常见的自愿性证据路径；IEC TS 63209延伸应力测试为建议性规范，但客户、融资方和保险方可能为可融资性而要求提供。截至2026年，尚无专门的协调钙钛矿标准。中国GB/T 9535认证单独可能不足以满足欧盟技术文件预期或市场接受。出口商应尽早开展预鉴定测试并联系具备能力的欧盟合格评定或测试机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。出口歐盟的鈣鈦礦和疊層光伏組件需要形成證據，以支持其符合適用歐盟法律要求及性能聲明。EN IEC 61215-1/-2設計鑒定是常見的自願性證據路徑；IEC TS 63209延伸應力測試為建議性規範，但客戶、融資方和保險方可能為可融資性而要求提供。截至2026年，尚無專門的協調鈣鈦礦標準。中國GB/T 9535認證單獨可能不足以滿足歐盟技術文件預期或市場接受。出口商應儘早開展預鑒定測試並聯繫具備能力的歐盟合格評定或測試機構。
